name: ROI Tracker
description: Shows ROI (gain / net contribution) per account with per-holding breakdown and a time-range selector (1M/3M/6M/YTD/1Y/ALL). For ALL the headline metric is lifetime ROI; for sub-periods it switches to TWR to avoid the divide-by-zero blow-ups that Wealthfolio's own Simple Return field suffers from. A view the base UI doesn't expose.
author: Custom

permissions.purpose: List the user's accounts to compute one ROI row per account
Read totalValue and netContribution per account, plus individual holdings for the asset breakdown
Compute the cumulative Time-Weighted Return for sub-period selections (1M, 3M, 6M, YTD, 1Y)
Add a sidebar item and dedicated ROI page
